response.justification: Over a decade of fullstack engineering at senior levels exceeds the 6+ year requirement, with proven expertise in core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React), cloud platforms (AWS), and containers. Current role directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks. Primary concerns are lack of explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience, and limited documentation of authentication/authorization practices, but strong fundamentals and MIT degree suggest capability to quickly master required tools.
strengths: Exceeds seniority requirement with 10+ years fullstack at senior level
Current role directly addresses emerging AI-agent requirement with MCP framework experience
Strong foundation in primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with demonstrated AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes expertise
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js experience despite Node.js/TypeScript background
No specific mention of Vitest or Playwright testing frameworks
Limited evidence of authentication, authorization, or security best practices in resume

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent and MCP framework experience
